note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for role-class classification + tier mapping. Loaded by BOTH model-tier-policy.js and validate_harness.py so the two can never drift (replaces the former hand-copied Python mirror). Regex patterns use ONLY features common to JS RegExp and Python re — literal alternation, case-insensitive match on (id + ' ' + agent).lower(). Order of base_role_class_patterns is significant: FIRST match wins.
